nodes.title: fix: strip null-valued optional parameters from tool calls for provider compatibility
fix(security): harden file permissions and header merging
fix(telegram): register commands for group scope + preserve topic thread params
feat(providers): add CommonStack provider support
feat(provider) Add Key-less AI Integration via Puter
fix: require provider prefix for models set without alias (#5790)
docs: add Hostinger installation guide
TTS: add Typecast provider (emotion presets, audio tuning, Asian language voices)
feat(hooks): add agentId to hook mappings
feat(skills): auto-discover project-scoped skills from .claude/skills and .agents/skills
feat(session_status): include ISO-8601 and Unix timestamps for scheduling (fixes #10841)
fix #11150 - [Bug]: Exec tool schema host default ignores tools.exec.host config
fix(config): skip stale legacy config files when openclaw.json exists
feat(docker): add linux/riscv64 image to Docker release
security: persistence-only secret redaction for session transcripts
feat(hooks): emit session prune lifecycle event
feat(hooks): emit gateway shutdown lifecycle events
feat(hooks): wire outbound message lifecycle hooks
Config Builder: align with existing OpenClaw web UI stack
feat: inject agent/session context as environment variables in exec commands
feat(web-search): add SearXNG as a search provider
Add opt-in rate limiting and token-based budgets for external API calls (#13615)
feat(agents): retry empty-stream once before fallback
fix(sandbox): pass docker.env config to container creation
System prompt: add guidance for spawning background sub-agents
feat: add before_context_send plugin hook
Fix repo name and link. Still named clawdbot-formal-models.
feat(slack): Add queue position indicators for message queues
Add Silent Ingest for Group Chat Messages
feat(signal): enhanced inbound handling, unsend, polls, and poll voting
fix(plugins): add postinstall patch for ESM-only package exports
feat/before-tool-result
Signal: add REST API support for containerized deployments
docs: remove note about personal single-user access from trusted proxy auth guidance
fix: surface billing/auth FailoverErrors as user-friendly messages
refactor(test): structural MockFn for harness exports
fix(agent): prevent session deadlock on timeout during tool execution
feat(a2a): implement agent_call and debate_call tools with response routing
feat: add `openclaw sessions scrub` command and doctor check for secret leaks
feat(status): group cron sessions for readability
docs: add xCloud hosting guide
feat(cron): add preCheck gate to skip jobs when nothing changed
Build: add runtime-only build target
fix(skills): update notion skill for API 2025-09-03
feat: crash-loop detection and last-known-good config rollback
feat(agents): Adds RLM harness: infinite context window (for some tasks)
feat(security): add client-side skill security enforcement
msteams: fix DM image delivery + user target routing
Discord: Discord canvas!
feat(hooks): wire before_tool_call/after_tool_call with veto support
revert(browser): remove extraArgs config
feat(tui): add light theme support for light terminal backgrounds
feat(agents): expose tools and their schemas via new after_tools_resolved hook [AI-assisted]
feat(hooks): add agent and tool lifecycle boundaries
fix(telegram): pass video width/height to sendVideo to prevent portra…
Security: add URL allowlist for web_search and web_fetch
feat(voice-call): streaming TTS, barge-in, silence filler, hangup, and voice agent config
feat: add MegaNova AI as built-in provider
fix: retry event-driven heartbeats blocked by requests-in-flight
docs: add Google (Gemini) provider documentation
feat: add github-copilot gpt-5.3-codex with xhigh support (AI-assisted)
feat: support messages.mediaLocalRoots for custom media directories
Fix: preserve modelOverride in agent handler (#5369)
feat(discord): clean up sessions when channel is deleted
feat: increase Brave search MAX_SEARCH_COUNT to 20 (AI-assisted)
fix(ui): prevent precision loss when coercing large numeric strings in config form
fix: preserve .env during package/plugin updates
fix(telegram): skip redundant final edit in partial streaming mode
fix(agents): only seed HEARTBEAT.md on brand-new workspaces
feat: add agent lifecycle hook events (session, message, error)
feat(docker): add init script support via /openclaw-init.d/
feat(telegram): native sendMessageDraft streaming (Bot API 9.3)
fix(security): OC-32 enforce content size limit in agents.files.set to prevent disk exhaustion DoS
fix(security): OC-101 refresh token rotation enforcement — Aether AI Agent
fix(gateway): support query parameter tokens for webhooks
docs: add IC Sovereign Persistent Memory to community plugins
fix(browser): stability improvements for headless Chrome
feat: add Amazon Bedrock as first-class onboarding provider
fix: Handle compaction when fallback model has smaller context window
fix(discord): register select menu handlers (unique customId)
feat(discord): allow disabling intermediate status reactions
fix(agents): replace hardcoded Anthropic model IDs with pattern matching
feat(agents): suppressPreToolText config + onBlockReply buffering
feat(voice-call): add Twilio non-US region support (region/edge config)
feat(plugins): add before_agent_reply hook (claiming pattern)
Update AGENTS.md - use adequate token for staying silent in group chats
docs: add awesome-openclaw-agents to Community section
fix(agents): use label and model in subagent completion announce
fix(memory): expose index concurrency as config option
fix(security): block command substitution in unquoted heredoc bodies
fix(memory): index reset session transcripts
fix: Update sessionFile path when rolling to new session in cron jobs
fix(memory-lancedb): consolidate preference keyword/category detection (EN+CS+CJK)
fix(whisper-skill): set execute bit on transcribe.sh (fixes #9303)
fix(webchat): resolve streaming scroll race condition
feat(ui): KaTeX math rendering, collapsible tool cards, image attach button & LaTeX→Unicode for channels
docs: clarify slash command authorization model and ownerAllowFrom
feat: make llm_input/llm_output modifying hooks for middleware patterns
feat: capture Anthropic rate-limit response headers to disk
fix(sessions): add session contamination guards and self-leak lock detection
